note: Snapshot of the leading sustainability reporting standards & frameworks referenced throughout the parameter schemas. Reflects status post-ESRS simplification (Dec 2025), IFRS S2 targeted amendments (Dec 2025), GHG Protocol Scope 3 revision in flight (final 2027), and TNFD v1 + LEAP guidance.

standards.name: European Sustainability Reporting Standards (CSRD)
standards.scope: Twelve standards under CSRD: ESRS 1 (general), ESRS 2 (cross-cutting), ESRS E1-E5, ESRS S1-S4, ESRS G1. Simplified ESRS final draft released December 2025, reducing mandatory datapoints ~61% (E1 −53%, E2 −61%, E3 −70%).
standards.status: Mandatory (first reports filed 2025 for wave 1; phased adoption through 2029).

standards.name: ISSB Sustainability Disclosure Standards
standards.scope: S1 general; S2 climate (TCFD-aligned + SASB industry metrics for 11 sectors / 70+ industries). ISSB issued targeted GHG amendments to S2 in Dec 2025.
standards.status: 30+ jurisdictions adopting (Hong Kong effective Aug 2025, Brazil + Chile Jan 2026, Pakistan Jul 2025, Australia Jan 2025).

standards.name: GHG Protocol Corporate Standard / Scope 2 Guidance / Scope 3 Standard
standards.scope: Scope 1, 2 (LB & MB), 3 (15 categories upstream/downstream). Revision in progress — Cat 15 narrowed to investments; proposed Cat 16 for facilitated emissions (underwriting/insurance). Final guidance expected 2027.
standards.status: De-facto global standard; underpins IFRS S2, ESRS E1, GRI 305.

standards.name: Global Reporting Initiative Standards
standards.scope: Universal (GRI 1-3), Economic (GRI 200s), Environmental (GRI 300s: 301 Materials, 302 Energy, 303 Water, 304 Biodiversity, 305 Emissions, 306 Waste, 308 Supplier Env), Social (GRI 400s).
standards.status: Most widely used framework globally (~60% of large-cap reporters).

standards.name: SASB Industry Standards
standards.scope: 77 industry standards with financially material metrics; now embedded as required SASB-based industry metrics in IFRS S2.

standards.name: Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures
standards.scope: Four pillars: Governance, Strategy, Risk Management, Metrics & Targets. Recommendations now embedded in IFRS S2.
standards.status: Disbanded as separate body; recommendations live via ISSB.

standards.name: Taskforce on Nature-related Financial Disclosures
standards.scope: Final recommendations Sept 2023. LEAP approach (Locate–Evaluate–Assess–Prepare). Core + additional disclosure metrics covering nature-related dependencies, impacts, risks, opportunities. Updated 2025 sectoral guidance.
standards.status: Voluntary but rapidly adopted; >500 organisations as TNFD Adopters.

standards.name: CDP — Climate, Water, Forests
standards.scope: Annual questionnaires for Climate (~150 datapoints), Water Security, Forests, Plastics (pilot). Aligned with IFRS S2 in 2024 onwards.
standards.status: Live; data drives many ESG ratings (MSCI, S&P, Sustainalytics).

standards.name: Science Based Targets initiative
standards.scope: 1.5°C-aligned target validation: near-term, net-zero, FLAG (Forest Land & Agriculture). Beyond Value Chain Mitigation (BVCM) recommendations.

standards.name: Science Based Targets Network — Nature
standards.scope: Methods for Freshwater, Land, Oceans, Biodiversity targets. Pilot validations ongoing.
standards.status: Methods v1 (Freshwater, Land) released; technical guidance evolving.

standards.name: EU Taxonomy Regulation
standards.scope: Six environmental objectives × Technical Screening Criteria + DNSH + Minimum Safeguards (OECD Guidelines + UNGPs). Disclose eligible & aligned revenue/CapEx/OpEx.
standards.status: In force; aligned with CSRD reporting.

standards.name: EU Deforestation Regulation (EU 2023/1115)
standards.scope: Geo-located, deforestation-free, legality due diligence for 7 commodities (cattle, cocoa, coffee, palm oil, rubber, soy, wood) + derivatives.

standards.name: OECD Guidelines for Multinational Enterprises on RBC + Due Diligence Guidance
standards.scope: Government-backed RBC recommendations; six-step risk-based due diligence. Referenced by SFDR, EU Taxonomy Minimum Safeguards, CSRD, China stock exchange guidelines.

standards.name: UN Guiding Principles on Business and Human Rights
standards.scope: Protect, Respect, Remedy framework; human rights due diligence; operational-level grievance mechanisms.

standards.name: ILO Core Labour Conventions
standards.scope: Freedom of association, collective bargaining, forced labour, child labour, discrimination, OSH (since 2022 fundamental).

standards.name: Partnership for Carbon Accounting Financials
standards.scope: Methodology for financed (Cat 15) emissions across asset classes; Capital Markets Standard for facilitated emissions.

standards.name: WBCSD Circular Transition Indicators v4
standards.scope: Company-agnostic circularity KPIs — inflow, outflow, water, energy, critical materials.
